# GenAI Requirements Checklist: GenAI Service

**Purpose**: Validate the clarity, completeness, and consistency of GenAI Service requirements before implementation planning.
**Created**: 2026-06-15
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are the required GenAI Job types fully enumerated, including quiz answering and player matching? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001, Spec §Key Entities]
- [x] CHK002 Are the allowed trigger points for GenAI Jobs complete enough to distinguish sync, admin, and scoring-publication workflows? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003]
- [x] CHK003 Are requirements defined for both accepted and rejected GenAI outcomes across quiz and player matching jobs? [Completeness, Spec §FR-009, Spec §FR-010, Spec §FR-016, Spec §FR-017]
- [x] CHK004 Are admin review requirements complete for successful GenAI outputs, including source, status, provider, and compact evidence? [Completeness, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §FR-020]
- [x] CHK005 Are notification requirements complete for all unresolved GenAI outcomes, including failure, timeout, invalid output, low confidence, and ambiguity? [Completeness, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §FR-010, Spec §FR-018]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK006 Is "smallest normalized data needed" defined clearly enough to guide each GenAI Job's input boundary? [Clarity, Spec §FR-004]
- [x] CHK007 Is "high confidence" quantified or otherwise clarified enough to avoid inconsistent acceptance decisions? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-009, Spec §FR-017]
- [x] CHK008 Is "compact evidence" defined with enough detail to distinguish acceptable evidence from a model explanation? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007, Spec §FR-009]
- [x] CHK009 Is the boundary between a GenAI-produced quiz label and a manual quiz label clear enough for scoring precedence? [Clarity, Spec §FR-012, Spec §FR-013]
- [x] CHK010 Is the phrase "provider-agnostic" specific enough to describe what must remain replaceable when Mistral is the initial provider? [Clarity, Spec §FR-002]
- [x] CHK011 Is "existing player database candidates" defined well enough to prevent broad or unbounded player search behavior? [Clarity, Spec §FR-016]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK012 Are the privacy requirements consistent between minimal input, excluded data types, and prompt/response retention? [Consistency, Spec §FR-004, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-006]
- [x] CHK013 Are quiz scoring requirements consistent with the rule that participant quiz prediction rows must not be updated? [Consistency, Spec §FR-011, Spec §FR-014]
- [x] CHK014 Are successful GenAI visibility requirements consistent with the rule that successes should not create notification-bell noise? [Consistency, Spec §FR-020, Spec §User Story 3]
- [x] CHK015 Are player matching requirements consistent with the requirement to preserve the original scorer or striker name? [Consistency, Spec §FR-016, Spec §FR-019]
- [x] CHK016 Are admin notification requirements consistent across quiz failures and player matching failures? [Consistency, Spec §FR-010, Spec §FR-018, Spec §FR-021]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK017 Are acceptance scenarios written for primary, invalid-output, insufficient-evidence, and admin-override quiz paths? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1]
- [x] CHK018 Are acceptance scenarios written for successful, outside-candidate, ambiguous, and audit-visible player matching paths? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 2]
- [x] CHK019 Can "no GenAI provider call from participant-facing reads" be objectively measured from the requirements? [Measurability, Spec §FR-003, Spec §SC-004]
- [x] CHK020 Are success criteria aligned with the functional requirements they measure, especially manual override precedence and deduplicated notifications? [Consistency, Spec §SC-005, Spec §SC-006, Spec §FR-012, Spec §FR-021]
- [x] CHK021 Is the 90% reviewability target scoped clearly enough to know which accepted GenAI labels are included? [Clarity, Spec §SC-001]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK022 Are alternate flows defined for quiz questions with unusual answer options or open-text answers? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK023 Are exception flows defined for provider unavailability and malformed model output? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-010, Spec §FR-018]
- [x] CHK024 Are recovery expectations specified after an admin manually resolves a failed GenAI quiz or player match? [Gap, Recovery Flow]
- [x] CHK025 Are requirements defined for repeated GenAI attempts after match facts or player candidates change? [Gap, Recovery Flow]
- [x] CHK026 Are requirements defined for how stale GenAI outputs should be treated when underlying match facts are corrected? [Gap, Recovery Flow]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK027 Are requirements defined for empty, overly broad, or duplicate-heavy player candidate shortlists? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK028 Are requirements defined for contradictory normalized match facts before a quiz answer is accepted? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK029 Are requirements defined for GenAI output that cites evidence not present in supplied facts? [Coverage, Spec §FR-009]
- [x] CHK030 Are requirements defined for a manual quiz label that already exists before a GenAI quiz job produces an answer? [Gap, Spec §FR-012]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK031 Are privacy requirements complete for all sensitive data categories that must not be sent to the LLM provider? [Completeness, Spec §FR-005]
- [x] CHK032 Are data retention requirements clear enough for accepted outputs, rejected outputs, compact evidence, and failure messages? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006, Spec §FR-007]
- [x] CHK033 Are participant-safety requirements clear enough to ensure provider errors and GenAI failures remain admin-only? [Clarity, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §FR-010, Spec §FR-018]
- [x] CHK034 Are performance or latency expectations intentionally excluded or missing for quick player matching calls? [Gap, Non-Functional]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK035 Are dependencies on data-sync normalized match facts clearly documented and bounded? [Dependency, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK036 Are dependencies on the existing admin panel clearly documented for manual quiz overwrite behavior? [Dependency, Spec §FR-013, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK037 Are assumptions about the first two GenAI Jobs consistent with the scope of all user stories and requirements? [Consistency, Spec §Assumptions, Spec §User Scenarios]
- [x] CHK038 Is the exclusion of full prompt/response retention aligned with audit and admin review requirements? [Assumption, Spec §FR-006, Spec §FR-007, Spec §Assumptions]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [x] CHK039 Is the relationship between deterministic quiz resolvers in the data-sync spec and GenAI quiz jobs clarified to avoid conflicting automation paths? [Ambiguity, Spec §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK040 Is the ownership of accepted player links specified clearly enough to know whether they affect scoring facts, metadata, or admin review only? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-019]
- [x] CHK041 Are "admin sync issue" and GenAI failure notification terms used consistently enough to avoid two separate notification concepts? [Ambiguity, Spec §Key Entities, Spec §FR-021]

## Notes

- Checklist items validate whether the requirements are precise and complete enough for planning. They are not implementation tests.
